map.action: shift ? smart_fader on & crossfader : smart_fader off & crossfader
shift ? param_greater 0 ? deck active loop_double : deck active loop_half : browser_scroll
shift ? browser_window 'folders' : holding ? browser_window 'folders' ? browser_folder : browser_window 'songs' : browser_window 'folders' ? browser_enter : browser_window 'folders'

shift ? down ? deck 1 play ? set '$left_shiftplay_was_playing' 1 & deck 1 goto_cue & deck 1 play : set '$left_shiftplay_was_playing' 0 & deck 1 cue_play : var '$left_shiftplay_was_playing' 1 ? nothing : deck 1 cue_stop : deck 1 pioneer_play
shift ? down ? deck 1 set_cue : nothing : deck 1 pioneer_cue
shift ? down ? deck 1 pitch_reset : nothing : deck 1 sync
shift ? down ? deck 1 key_lock : nothing : deck 1 pfl
shift ? down ? deck 1 filter 50% & deck 1 filter_activate off : nothing : deck 1 filter_activate
shift ? down ? deck 1 unload : nothing : deck 1 load

shift ? down ? deck 2 play ? set '$right_shiftplay_was_playing' 1 & deck 2 goto_cue & deck 2 play : set '$right_shiftplay_was_playing' 0 & deck 2 cue_play : var '$right_shiftplay_was_playing' 1 ? nothing : deck 2 cue_stop : deck 2 pioneer_play
shift ? down ? deck 2 set_cue : nothing : deck 2 pioneer_cue
shift ? down ? deck 2 pitch_reset : nothing : deck 2 sync
shift ? down ? deck 2 key_lock : nothing : deck 2 pfl
shift ? down ? deck 2 filter 50% & deck 2 filter_activate off : nothing : deck 2 filter_activate
shift ? down ? deck 2 unload : nothing : deck 2 load
deck 1 play ? deck 1 get_level & param_multiply 1.10 : get constant 0.0
deck 2 play ? deck 2 get_level & param_multiply 1.10 : get constant 0.0
deck 1 filter_activate off & deck 2 filter_activate off
deck 1 filter_activate on & deck 2 filter_activate on
